items.title: Fix CompileAndRun crash
items.description: ConsoleUtilSSE-style relocation fix (RELOCATION_ID 441582 for patch >= 1130). Credit: VersuchDrei/ConsoleUtilSSE, MIT License.

items.title: SEH crash protection
items.description: __try/__except around CompileAndRun catches access violations safely.

items.title: God mode via direct API
items.description: Static bool flip via RELOCATION_ID(517711, 404238). No console command.

items.title: Collision toggle via direct API
items.description: TESObjectREFR::SetCollision(). No console command.

items.title: Time control via direct API
items.description: Calendar::gameHour->value direct write for SetGameTime.

items.title: Connection health monitoring
items.description: Ping action for pipe connectivity check.

items.title: Named pipe architecture
items.description: SKSE plugin pipe server + C# MCP pipe client. JSON protocol, newline-delimited.

items.title: SKSE task thread dispatch
items.description: All game API calls marshaled to game thread via SKSE::GetTaskInterface with promise/future.

items.title: Static linking
items.description: x64-windows-static vcpkg triplet eliminates external DLL dependencies.

items.title: HUD notifications
items.description: RE::DebugNotification for in-game messages. Auto-notify on god mode, collision, items, stats, save.

items.title: Console command execution
items.description: ExecuteConsoleCommand with output capture via lastMessage. Dot-notation for NPC targeting (refId.command).

items.title: Async save game
items.description: BGSSaveLoadManager::Save() with fire-and-forget from Protocol. Auto-names from player info.

items.title: Event system noise filtering
items.description: Hardcoded suppression of framework quests (FEBD3801, 000F9075). Poll filters: eventTypes, excludeTypes.

items.title: prid doesn't persist between calls
items.description: Workaround: use dot-notation (refId.command). Tool descriptions updated to guide AI to correct pattern.

items.title: Save game timeout
items.description: Fixed via async save — responds immediately, save completes in background.

items.title: Teleport via direct API
items.description: Currently works via coc console command. No clean direct API found yet.

items.title: Force load save via MCP
items.description: BGSSaveLoadManager::Load() to load a save directly without going through main menu. Bypasses death-handling mods that can hang the menu transition. Could accept save name or 'most recent'.

items.title: Force new game via MCP
items.description: Trigger new game initialization directly, bypassing main menu. Useful when death mods interfere with menu transitions or for automated testing workflows.

items.title: CTD on loading save after MCP character replication session
items.description: Repro path: 1) Load test_dunmer save (fresh Dark Elf, Level 1, TestTony cell). 2) Run get_character_blueprint with outputPath (worked fine, returned summary). 3) Use bulk_add_items to add ~36 items from Arya Adahar's blueprint (all succeeded, 0 failures). 4) Use add_item individually for ~20+ more items including gold (4.6M), soul gems, weapons, armor, mod items with FE-prefix FormIDs. 5) Run execute_console_command to save game ('save test_dunmer_replication_checkpoint'). 6) Attempt to load Arya Adahar's save (different character, Breton Level 250) — CTD on load screen. Unclear if CTD is caused by: (a) MCP pipe state corruption after heavy item injection, (b) save file corruption from bulk_add_items touching mod FormIDs, (c) unrelated issue with Arya's save itself (heavily modded, 695 active effects), or (d) loading a different character's save while MCP session is active. Need to verify: can test_dunmer's checkpoint save load successfully? Can Arya's save load from a cold start (no prior MCP session)? Mod FormIDs injected via add_item/bulk_add_items: FE2990A6, FE97DD63, FE4D400F, FE5BB800, FEE2E800, FEA2BB5D, FEA2BB4D, FEA2BB4C, FE65595B, FE775838, FE6558FA, FE6CBE83, FE6C5B65, FE6B6A5F, FE6B6D7F, FED3980A, FEF07802, FECCC817, FECCC80A, FECCC800, FE00E9EA, FE56682B, FE566801, plus Dawnguard/Dragonborn (02xxxxxx, 04xxxxxx) and heavy-plugin items (59xxxxxx, 88xxxxxx, F4xxxxxx, FBxxxxxx).

items.title: Character blueprint export
items.description: GetCharacterBlueprint — single call exporting skills, perks, spells, shouts, equipment, inventory, gold, effects. OutputPath parameter added — writes to disk, returns summary only. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Level management
items.description: Set level, add XP, show XP to next level.

items.title: Appearance query
items.description: GetAppearance — race, sex, weight, height, 19 face morphs, face presets, head parts, carry weight.

items.title: Carry weight query
items.description: Included in GetAppearance — carryWeight and carryWeightBase via ActorValueOwner.

items.title: Favorites query
items.description: GetFavorites — all favorited spells/items from MagicFavorites singleton.

items.title: Inventory enchantments + display names
items.description: GetInventory now returns displayName (custom renamed items) and enchantment with full effect list.

items.title: NPC FormID confusion — refId vs baseId
items.description: get_nearby_npcs now returns both refId and baseId. Tool descriptions clarify which to use.

items.title: Hit events misattributed
items.description: Hit events now include targetRole/attackerRole (player/follower/other) and IsPlayerTeammate check.

items.title: Blueprint export to file via outputPath
items.description: GetCharacterBlueprint now accepts optional outputPath parameter. Writes full JSON to disk, returns only a summary (counts of spells, perks, shouts, inventory items, active effects). Solves context window overflow for heavily modded characters (695+ active effects, 176+ inventory items). Tested on test_dunmer — 130KB output, clean write.

items.title: Bulk add items
items.description: BulkAddItems accepts JSON array of {formId, count} objects. Adds all in one call, reports success/failure per item. Tested: 36 items in single call, 0 failures. Much more efficient than individual add_item calls for blueprint replication.

infrastructure.title: Event system
infrastructure.description: 17 event types via ScriptEventSourceHolder sinks. PollEvents with filters.

infrastructure.title: SKSE plugin scanner
infrastructure.description: GetLoadedSKSEPlugins scans Data/SKSE/Plugins/*.dll with integration notes.

infrastructure.title: Form search engine
infrastructure.description: SearchForms — direct form database search replacing console help command.

infrastructure.title: Load order query
infrastructure.description: GetLoadOrder + GetModFormIdPrefix for ESP/ESL index lookup.

infrastructure.title: VPrint hook
infrastructure.description: Full console output capture for multi-line command results.

infrastructure.title: Config file
infrastructure.description: .ini or .toml for pipe name, log level, feature toggles, event blacklist.

infrastructure.title: Performance caching
infrastructure.description: Cache frequently queried data to reduce game thread blocking.

infrastructure.title: Push events via pipe
infrastructure.description: Pipe Protocol v2 — unsolicited event messages from plugin to client.

infrastructure.title: Plugin DI system
infrastructure.description: Dynamic integration with detected SKSE plugins via LoadLibrary/GetProcAddress.

infrastructure.title: Console output capture incomplete
infrastructure.description: lastMessage only captures last line. VPrint hook needed for full multi-line output.

keyDiscoveries: Dot-notation console commands work: refId.command correctly targets NPCs.
get_nearby_npcs returns reference IDs. setessential needs base FormID, kill/prid need ref ID.
CompileAndRun needs RELOCATION_ID 441582 for Skyrim >= 1.6.1130 (ConsoleUtilSSE approach).
Event system captures everything but framework quests (NFF etc.) spam start/stop events.
Save game with 4000+ plugins takes 10+ seconds — async fire-and-forget is required.
Static linking (x64-windows-static) required — dynamic linking causes SKSE load failure.
Blueprint outputPath is essential — full blueprint JSON for modded characters is 130KB+, overflows MCP context window without it.
Bulk add items (36 items, 0 failures) works reliably for character replication. All FE-prefix and vanilla FormIDs resolved correctly.
CTD occurred when loading a different save (Arya) after heavy MCP item injection session on test_dunmer — needs investigation (BUG-007).
